title: Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Property Advisor to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Properties Advisory Limited:
Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties Advisory Limited!
